text: Chatbots refer to a computer program which uses artificial intelligence (AI) and natural language processing (NLP) to imitate human conversations with people through either text or speech. A new example of a chatbot known as “ChatGPT” that uses the third-generation generative pre-trained transformer (GPT-3) developed by OpenAI, has been praised for outstanding text output performance and there have been claims that the output is both more accurate and precise, especially for data related to science, technology, engineering and mathematics, and as well as concerns over referencing legality. In light of the developments above, the study looks into the instances of “AI hallucination” which refer to results that are made up, non-existent or are no relation to the actual topic, specifically for the cases of research proposals that are wholly written by ChatGPT.
